name: Synthetic Captive
short_description: Synthetic Captive is a first-person stealth escape game designed to reveal that the most terrifying monsters originate from the human mind. In this dungeon, escape is nearly impossible. You play as the protagonist, exploring the dungeon prison, struggling to survive and escape.
detailed_description:
Synthetic Captive is a first-person stealth escape game designed to reveal that the most terrifying monsters originate from the human mind. In this dungeon, escape is nearly impossible. You play as the protagonist, exploring the dungeon prison, struggling to survive and escape.

Story Synopsis:

In a mysterious, remote location lies an ancient dungeon prison. Its existence has remained unknown to all, until...

The prison operates under a simple rule: the only way to leave is through death. As you delve deeper, chilling truths begin to surface—this may not be a prison at all, but something far more sinister...

Game Features:

  • Authentic Stealth Experience: You’re not a warrior—your only chance of escaping this horrific prison is to hide... or die.

  • Immersive Environment: Meticulously crafted eerie scenes, with every detail designed to send shivers down your spine.

  • Hide and Sneak: Stealth-based gameplay infused with hiding mechanics.

  • Unpredictable Enemies: Players can never predict when or where the dungeon’s terrifying inhabitants will catch up to them.

  • Dynamic Surveillance System: Ceiling-mounted cameras constantly swivel, their red indicator lights gleaming like a beast’s eyes. When alarms sound, you must hide immediately.

  • Sound Detection System: Any loud noise could attract pursuers, requiring cautious movement.

  • True Horror: The settings of Synthetic Captive are inspired by real dungeons, delivering an immersive experience that feels all too real.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean
*languages with full audio support
